extortion.description: Microdevice specializes in building automation systems, offering supervision solutions for hotels, offices, homes, nursing homes, and hospitals. Their products include access control, consumption monitoring, and management of lockers, minibars, and safes. With over 30 years of experience, Microdevice emphasizes reliable data, limitless system implementation, and custom solutions tailored to clients' needs. Their innovative platform, Hi4-Supervisor, provides integrated management for various supervisory systems.
